examples: Hi, Professor Archer, you know how in class last week you said that you were looking for students who are interested in volunteering for your archeology project?
I actually wrote to a number of archeology departments and offered up my services.
Main directions are represented by archeology biology medicine nanotechnology etc.
But maybe projects like this mark the next phase of Internet fanaticism: Digital archeology.
The skeletons are being excavated and taken to the Museum of London Archeology for further testing.
